prompts.title: Energy-absorbing dimpled separation 1
prompts.description: Held-out unnamed materials description; compare predetermined full-vocabulary ranks and target-free discovery under matched lenses.
prompts.text: A round aluminum bar stretched into a pronounced waist before separating. The mating faces contained hemispherical pits centered on inclusions and a slanted tearing rim.
prompts.note: Frozen held-out item. Predetermined terms are used only for the rank endpoint; open-vocabulary generation and ranking cannot use them.
